name: Rodriguez
summary: Rodriguez the Portuguese, of the party that went ashore on the risen island, who climbed the foot of the monolith and shouted of his find — the immense carved door with the squid-dragon bas-relief.
description:
It was Rodriguez the Portuguese who climbed up the foot of the monolith and shouted of what he had found. The rest followed him, and looked curiously at the immense carved door with the now familiar squid-dragon bas-relief.

The manuscript records nothing further of him individually.

sources.quote: It was Rodriguez the Portuguese who climbed up the foot of the monolith and shouted of what he had found. The rest followed him, and looked curiously at the immense carved door with the now familiar squid-dragon bas-relief.
sources.context: Chapter 3, The Madness from the Sea
